title: Fabulous Wynncraft
description: Dive into the stunning world of Wynncraft with Fabulous Wynncraft, where jawdropping visuals meet convenient gameplay at great performance!
body:
# Fabulous Wynncraft [![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/built-with/fabulously-optimized_46h.png)](https://download.fo) [![Installation Guide][img-install]](#installation-guide) [![Config][img-config]](https://gitlab.com/tobilinz/fabulous-wynncraft/-/tree/main/config) [![Mod list][img-mods]](https://gitlab.com/tobilinz/fabulous-wynncraft/-/tree/main/mods) Dive into the stunning world of Wynncraft with Fabulous Wynncraft, where jawdropping visuals meet convenient gameplay at great performance! > By downloading Fabulous Wynncraft, you have acknowledged the [disclaimers](https://download.fo/terms) of Fabulously Optimized. Please note that I cannot be held responsible for any bans from Wynncraft. **Lightning Fast Performance**¹ Built on the powerful Fabulously Optimized framework, Fabulous Wynncraft delivers a gaming experience that outpaces other clients. Say goodbye to lag and hello to smooth adventures! **Tailored for Wynncraft** This modpack is designed for Wynncraft enthusiasts. Enjoy many of quality-of-life features, including an in-game map, improved tooltips, custom menus, in-game notes and so much more to elevate your gameplay! **Breathtaking Visuals**² Immerse yourself in the stunning graphics of Fabulous Wynncraft. With [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and a selection of additional mods, your gameplay will be polished to perfection. Are you ready to embard on your unforgettable journey in the world of Wynncraft with Fabulous Wynncraft?
¹ If you are experiencing low FPS, then wait a couple of minutes. Some mods like Distant Horizons take some time to load everything. If your FPS still don't increase, refer to the [Performance Section](#performance) for more help. ² If you have high enough FPS, then consider turning up some graphics settings for even better visuals. Refer to the [Visuals Section](#visuals) for more info. ## Installation Guide *This guide has partially been copied from the official [Fabulously Optimized installation guide](https://wiki.download.fo/install-instructions). You can find additional installation instructions there. However, keep in mind that this modpack is exclusively made for Modrinth. Fabulously Optimized has been made for many more providers. Therefore some guides that work for Fabulously Optimized might not work for Fabulous Wynncraft.* ### [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) 1. On the sidebar, select the lens icon and search for "Fabulous Wynncraft". 2. Click `⤓ Install`. 3. The modpack will now install. 4. Once installed, select the house icon the the sidebar and hover on the created instance under "Jump back in" 5. Click ▶️ button to play. ### [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/) You need [Java 21](https://prismlauncher.org/wiki/getting-started/installing-java/) to play the game. 1. Click `Add Instance` 2. Select `Modrinth` tab from the left 3. Search for "Fabulous Wynncraft" 4. Select "Fabulous Wynncraft" 5. Click `OK`. 6. The modpack will now install. 7. Once installed, double-click the icon to play. ### [Steam Deck](https://www.steamdeck.com/) + Prism Launcher 1. With Steam Deck turned on, hold down `⏻` (power) and tap `Switch to Desktop`. 2. From the taskbar, select 👜 "Discover". 3. Tap the searchbar on the top left corner, then press ❎ to open the on-screen keyboard. 4. Search for "Prism Launcher" and tap `Install` on the first result. 5. Launch it and go through its initial setup process, then close it. 6. Open Steam app, select `Games` → `Add a Non-Steam Game to My Library...` → select Prism Launcher → `ADD SELECTED PROGRAMS`. 7. Close Steam and launch `Return to Gaming Mode`. 8. Launch Prism Launcher from your game library. 9. Tap `Add Instance` 10. Select `Modrinth` tab from the left 11. Search for "Fabulous Wynncraft" 12. Select "Fabulous Wynncraft" 13. Click `OK`. 14. The modpack will now install. 15. Once installed, double-tap the icon and wait. 16. Tap `Options...` → `Controls...` → `Controller Settings...` 17. Select a controller, then `Done` → `Done` → `Done` 18. The game is now set up and you can just launch it from your game library from now on. 19. Bonus: if you want a better icon in your game library, [Follow these instructions](https://prismlauncher.org/download/steam-deck/#setting-up-artwork). P.S. If you get Deck-specific issues, try asking on [r/SteamDeck](https://old.reddit.com/r/steamdeck) as I don't have one. ## Post Installation / Additional Tips ### General - It is recommended to allocate at least 4 GB of RAM for Minecraft. Depending on the Minecraft launcher you are using, this process is different. Please look up Tutorials on how to do this. ### Server Commands The following commands can only be executed on Wynncraft. | Command | Action | Reason | |---------|--------|--------| | `/toggle ghosts low` | Shows less players around you | This might improve your FPS | ### Performance - On the Wynncraft server, do `/toggle ghosts low` to show less players around you - Lower the Distant Horizons (a mod that lets you see further) settings under `ESC > Options... > [Squre icon on the top left with yellow, green, and blue squares with a black border] > Advanced Options > Graphics > Render Quality`. Recommended settings to lower first: - LOD Dropoff Distance (`Lowest` and `Low` will make terrain further away look worse quicker and increase your FPS) - Vertical Quality (Lower Number = will make terrain further away have less detail and increase your FPS) - Lower your shader (shaders improve lighting and other visual aspects) settings under `ESC > Options... > Video Settings... > Shader Packs... > Shader Pack Settings... > Performance Settings` (don't forget to hit `Apply` afterwards). Recommended settings to lower first: - Shadow Distance (a lower value will decrease the distance in which you will still see shadows and increase your FPS) - Entity Shadows (turning this off will cause entities like players and mosters to not have shadows and increase your FPS) - Turn shaders (shaders improve lighting and other visual aspects) off completely under `ESC > Options... > Video Settings... > Shader Packs... > Shaders: Enabled` (don't forget to hit `Apply`). Your game might freeze for a little while. - Turn Distant Horizons (a mod that lets you see further) off completely under `ESC > Options... > [Squre icon on the top left with yellow, green, and blue squares with a black border] > Enable Rendering`. To do this, click on the button that says `True`. Your game might freeze for a little while. ### Visuals To improve your visuals you can do the oppisite from what is described in the [Performance Section](#performance). In addition, you can increase more shader settings under `ESC > Options... > Video Settings... > Shader Packs... > Shader Pack Settings... > Performance Settings`. ## How to build This section is targeted towards advanced users. 1. Clone `https://github.com/tobilinz/packwiz-basedon` 2. Change into the `packwiz-basedon` directory 3. Build the fork using `go build -o packwiz main.go` 4. Clone this project 5. Move the output binary of the third step (`packwiz`) to the cloned repository of step 4 6. Execute `./packwiz modrinth export` 7. A `.mrpack` file should show up after the command finished executing *NOTE: Using the official packwiz binary won't work because this modpack makes use of some custom functionality I added.* [img-install]: [img-mods]: [img-config]:
